description: A property manager needs to schedule annual preventive maintenance, such as HVAC servicing and gutter cleaning, for a property.

nodes.task_description: Identify that annual HVAC service is due based on the property's maintenance schedule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is alerted by the system that maintenance is due.

nodes.task_description: Create work orders for HVAC servicing and gutter cleaning and assign them to approved vendors.

expected_outcome.value: Work orders are created and dispatched.

nodes.task_description: Notify the tenant of the upcoming maintenance appointments.

expected_outcome.value: Tenant is informed of the date and time of the service.
